title: Enhanced OnVista
description: A Python toolkit that turns German market-data pages into something scripts can actually use.
body:
Enhanced OnVista is a Python toolkit for making German market-data sources easier to work with in code.

The job is simple and useful: take data that normally lives in pages and brittle manual workflows, then turn it into something scripts can collect, rank, compare, and reuse.

## What it supports

- Access to German market data from OnVista-style sources.
- Instrument ranking and fundamentals extraction.
- Batch processing for larger research runs.
- A bridge between raw market pages and structured analysis code.

## Why it matters

A lot of finance research starts with copy-paste and ends with unrepeatable decisions. This project moves the work toward structured tooling.

## Public boundary

This is not investment advice and does not publish trading recommendations. It is shared as an engineering project for market-data access and analysis.
